name: Domino
description: Two-tone tiles flipping between orientations like a table of dominoes mid-shuffle — halves trade colors as the tiles turn.

code.style: --a: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --b: @p(var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rot: @p(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 86%; height: 86%; margin: 7%; background: var(--a); border-radius: 8%; transform: rotate(var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; width: 100%; height: 50%; background: var(--b); border-radius: 0 0 10% 10%; transition: ease 500ms; } } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
